name: I Have Decided
chorusText:
I have decided
* I have decided, to follow Jesus
* I have decided, to follow Jesus
* I have decided, to follow Jesus
no turning back, praise the Lord
no turning back.
* You take the whole world, but give me Jesus
* You take the whole world, but give me Jesus
* You take the whole world, but give me Jesus
* Jesus before me, the world behind me
* Jesus before me, the world behind me
* Jesus before me, the world behind me
* If you don’t follow, still I wil follow
* If you don’t follow, still I wil follow
* If you don’t follow, still I wil follow
